10001.name: Level-Up Ranking
10001.description: Event ends at 23:59 hrs, the top 50 players in level rank will receive valuable reward. (EXP will be compared if players' level is the same. Reward will be sent by system mail)

20001.name: Battle Power Ranking
20001.description: Event ends at 23:59 hrs, players who are top 5 in Battle Power Ranking will receive one Battle Power Gift Pack (Reward will be sent via mail). During the event period, if you reached the Target Battle Power and obtain Target Battle Power Gift Pack.

30001.name: Arena Rank
30001.tname: Wipe Out Your Opponents and Become No.1
30001.description: On the second, fourth, sixth day from the server opening, the top 3 players in the arena rank will each get a bonus reward (According to the rank at 19:30 every day in the arena). Meanwhile, every day there will be 5 lucky players, and they will receive a lucky gift. Rewards will be sent by in-game mail.

30002.name: Arena Rank
30002.tname: Wipe Out Your Opponents and Become No.1
30002.description: On the second, fourth, sixth day from the server opening, the top 3 players in the arena rank will each get a bonus reward (According to the rank at 19:30 every day in the arena). Meanwhile, every day there will be 5 lucky players, and they will receive a lucky gift. Rewards will be sent by in-game mail.

40001.name: Recruit Partners
40001.tname: Recruit Purple Partners and get Coupons
40001.description: During the event period, recruit corresponding Purple partners to get extra reward

50001.name: Trial Tower Clearing
50001.description: During the event, unlocking Trial Tower level can receive rewards. Reward limit: 30

60001.name: Clear Instance
60001.description: During event, clear corresponding instances can obtain rewards. Rewards limit: 30

70001.name: Single Top-up
70001.description: During the event period, Single Top-up reaches corresponding amount and immediately receive super value rewards!

70002.name: Single Top-up
70002.description:
Event starting time is when the event appears within the game.
Top-up prior to event starting time does not count towards the event.                                                                         During the event period, single top-up to corresponding amount to received great value rewards.
Reward will be sent out immediately via in-game mail.

70003.name: Single Top-up
70003.description: During the event period, Single Top-up reaches corresponding amount and immediately receive super value rewards!

70004.name: Single Top-up
70004.description: During the event period, Single Top-up reaches corresponding amount and immediately receive super value rewards!

70005.name: Single Top-up
70005.description: During the event period, Single Top-up reaches corresponding amount and immediately receive super value rewards!

70006.name: Single Top-up
70006.description:
Event starting time is when the event appears within the game.
Top-up prior to event starting time does not count towards the event.                                                                         During the event period, single top-up to corresponding amount to received great value rewards.
Reward will be sent out immediately via in-game mail.

80001.name: Accumulate Top-up
80001.description: During the event period, accumulate top-up to corresponding amount to received great value gifts

80002.name: Accumulate Top-up
80002.tname: Acumulate Top-up to Win Advanced Items
80002.description:
Event starting time is when the event appears within the game.
Top-up prior to event starting time does not count towards the event.                                                                         During the event period, accumulate top-up to corresponding amount to received great value rewards.
Reward will be sent out immediately via in-game mail.

80003.name: Accumulate Top-up
80003.description: During the event period, accumulate top-up to corresponding amount to received great value gifts

80004.name: Accumulate Top-up
80004.description: During the event period, accumulate top-up to corresponding amount to received great value gifts

80005.name: Accumulate Top-up
80005.description: During the event period, accumulate top-up to corresponding amount to received great value gifts

80006.name: Accumulate Top-up
80006.tname: Acumulate Top-up to Win Advanced Items
80006.description:
Event starting time is when the event appears within the game.
Top-up prior to event starting time does not count towards the event.                                                                         During the event period, accumulate top-up to corresponding amount to received great value rewards.
Reward will be sent out immediately via in-game mail.

90001.name: Daily Top-up
90001.description: Daily top-up 500 Gold to get rewards

90002.name: Daily Top-up
90002.description:
Event starting time is based on the time of the event appears in the game.
Top-up prior to event starting time does not count towards the event.
During event , top-up 888 Gold or above to get super value rewards.
Event rewards will reset at 00:00 daily, players need to claim the rewards before reset. Unclaimed rewards will not be compensated.

100001.name: Accumulate Spending
100001.description: During the event period, when you spend gold (or coupons) to designated amount you'll get great rebates.

110001.name: Daily Consumption
110001.description: Complete the requested task to get extra rewards (once daily)

120001.name: VIP Treasure Box
120001.tname: VIP Special Privilleges Enjoy More Discounts
120001.description: Become a VIP during the event period and receive corresponding abundant VIP Gifts

120002.name: Valentine's gift
120002.description: Become a VIP during the event period and receive corresponding abundant VIP Gifts

130001.name: First Top Up Gift Pack
130001.tname: First Top Up Gift Pack! Sexy Yoruichi arrives!

200001.name: Rank Upgrade
200001.description: During event upgrade your rank to get rewards, the amount of rewards is limited to 30.

210001.name: Synthesize Spirit Stones
210001.tname: Synthesize Spirit Stones, Increases Battle Power
210001.description: During the event period, synthesize Spirit Stones to corresponding target to get great reward

220001.name: Equipment Collection
220001.tname: You collect equipment, we give away rewards!
220001.description: During the event, obtain one corresponding purple equipment set to get extra rewards.

230001.name: Treasure Upgrades
230001.description: During the event, upgrade treasure to corresponding level receive rewards

280001.name: Daily Accumulate Top-up
280001.tname: Get Great Items for Daily Accumulate Top-up
280001.description: During the event period, top-up designated gold amount each day to receive super value gifts; this record will be cleared next day. (Please receive reward timely)

290001.name: Daily Accumulated Comsumption
290001.tname: Daily Accumulate Consumption and Get Super Value Gifts
290001.description: During the event period, spend designated gold amount each day to receive super value gifts; this record will be cleared next day. (Please receive reward timely)

290002.name: Visor Legion
290002.description: During the event period, when you spend 1 gold or coupon you'll get 1 Reiryoku points; when you collect enough Reiryoku points you'll get corresponding coupons as gifts (sent immediately via mail). The records will be cleared everyday at Midnight.

290003.name: Daily Accumulated Comsumption
290003.tname: Daily Accumulate Consumption and Get Super Value Gifts
290003.description: During the event period, spend designated gold amount each day to receive super value gifts; this record will be cleared next day. (Please receive reward timely)

300001.name: Level Up
300001.description: 1. Only Gold can be used to purchase this gift pack 2. Gift pack has activate level 3. Follow-up gift packs will be obtained when opening the original gift pack after purchase 4. Each type of gift pack can be purchased once

310001.name: Urahara Shop
310001.tname: Urahara Shop Super Value Items(Limited to one purchase)
310001.description:
1. Players can only buy one type of Growth Fund (Please choose wisely) 
2. Purchase Growth Fund can get Growth Fund Gift Pack, Growth Fund rewards will be sent in 30 times
310001.tip: 1.Once Growth Fund is purchased, players cannot purchase other funds 2. Fund rewards %0 coupons will be sent by mail at 00:30 daily 3. There will be 30 rebates 4. Rewards will still be sent even if the player is offline

320001.name: Fund Investment
320001.description: 1. Only Gold can be used to purchase this investment 2. Each investment choice can be purchased once 3. After purchase, you will receive a random amount of Coupons within the displayed range

340001.name: Seireitei Treasure Vault
340001.description:
1. Use Coupons to buy Packs in the first 2 tabs.
2. Each Pack has a limited number of purchases.
3. You can buy the Hogu Pack only once.
4. You can buy only 1 of the 4 Hogu.
5. The Hogu tab uses Gold.

240001.name: Evil Spirit Attacks
240001.description: Players who is No. 1 in dealing damage to Evil Spirits every day will get the daily No. 1 in Attacking Evil Spirit Reward, event reward will be sent out via mail after the Evil Spirit Attacks event on the same day.

250001.name: Guild Level
250001.description: Each clan's guild level top 3 guilds can get rewards when event ends. Rewards will be sent by mail after event. If guild level is same, guild experience will be compared. Guild members will only be counted before event ends.

260001.name: Guild War
260001.description: During daily Guild War, members of the guild with the highest points will get rewards. Rewards will be sent by mail after event. Guild wins if the guild reached the point first when there are two guilds with same points. Guild members will only be counted before event ends.

270001.name: Protect Seireitei
270001.description: During daily Protect Seireitei event, guild which defends successfully will get rewards. Rewards will be sent by mail after event. Remark: There won't be any rewards if attacking guild wins. If there is no attacking guild, there won't be any rewards for defending guild.

370001.name: Surprise Gift Box
370001.description:
1. Top-up any amount to receive Pink Suprise Box and activate the rights to purchase the first row of supervalue gift box.
2. Single Top-up 400 Gold can receive Pink and Gold Suprise Gift Box, also activate the rights to purchase all supervalue gift box.
3. The events last for 5 days and reset at Midnight daily. You can top-up again the next to activate and purchase.

330001.name: Espada Treasure
330001.description:
1. There are 10 tiers of rewards. Players can claim each tier once per day when that day's top-up reaches the requirement.
2. When that day's top-up reaches the requested amount, players can purchase the Espada recommended super value gift pack.
3. Top-up progress, reward claim status, and purchase chances reset at 00:00 daily.

350001.name: Artifact Pavilion
350001.description:
1.Each piece of equipment can be redeemed 3 times
2. If the number of fragments is not enough when exchanging equipment, you can use Gold to make up for it.

extra.page1_desc:
1. The event lasts for 5 days
2. Players can get 3 free lottery opportunities every day
3. Use Gold to temper the fragments, and you can extract prop rewards and equipment fragments
4. Each piece of equipment can be redeemed 3 times. If the number of fragments is not enough when exchanging equipment, you can use Gold to make up for it.
5. After the event, the remaining fragments will be cleared and will not be retained. Players are requested to redeem them in time.
extra.page2_desc:
1. Use Gold to temper fragments to randomly obtain a prop reward and corresponding equipment fragments
2. After the event, the remaining fragments will be cleared and will not be retained.

350002.name: Artifact Pavilion
350002.tname: Luxurious VIP Privilege Enjoys More Benefits
350002.description: 1. You can exchange for each equipment 3 times.                                                                                                                                                            2. When you don't have enough fragments, you can use Gold directly.

extra.page1_desc:
1. Event will last for 5 days
2. Players will have 3 free lucky draw chances per day
3. Players can use Gold Quench Fragments to ramdomly obtain items and equipment fragments
4. Each equipment can be redeemed for 3 times, players can use Gold if the fragments are not enough.
5. All fragments will be cleared when event ends. Please redeem in time.
extra.page2_desc:
1. Players can use Gold Quench Fragments to ramdomly obtain items and equipment fragments
2. Left over fragments can redeem items at fragment shop. All fragments will be cleared when event ends. Please redeem in time.

380001.name: Kon's Treasure Box
380001.description:
1. Single Top-up corresponding gold can activate corresponding reward; single top-up of 25000 gold can activate all reward.
2. After the event starts, during the first 5 days can activate treasure chest and receive reward; the second 5 days can only receive the previously actvated reward

390001.name: New Year Sign-In
390001.description:
1. During the event, players can claim the daily sign-in reward in the event.
2. You can only claim the reward for the current day.

410001.name: Lucky Koi
410001.description:
1. After the event starts, there is a chance to get different numbers of golden carps by attacking the levels.
2. Collect enough golden carps to receive gift packs and Pisces Zanpakutō.
3. The gift pack is a recurring reward, and no gold carp is consumed to receive the reward.
4. Collect golden carps to have a chance to enter the rankings and get ranking gift packs and titles.

extra.rank_desc:
1. The number of golden carps collected will no longer be recorded 10 minutes before the event ends.
2. Ranking refreshed every 5 minutes
3. Ranking gift packs will be distributed via email after the event.
4. After the event, you can equip the title in the title list

400001.name: Blessing Zanpakuto
400001.description:
1. Spend Gold on value gift packs to draw for Scythe Fragments and Golden Koi. Your first draw each day is half price.
2. Claim 1 Lucky Bag for free each day. Extra Lucky Bags must be bought with Gold.
3. Each Lucky Bag can only be bought or claimed once per day and resets at 24:00.
4. Spend Scythe Fragments to exchange for Dark Rukia and special gift packs.

420001.name: Make Money
420001.description:
During the 5 days of event, top up a certain amount of Gold to get Gold rebate. Rebate Gold can be claimed on the 6th day.
Top up for continuously 5 days to get an extra 5% of the total top-up Gold rebate

430001.name: Treasure Gamble
430001.description:
During the event period, players can participate in the guessing. There are 3 free participation opportunities and 3 free error tolerance opportunities every day.
When the winning streak reaches a certain number of times, you can receive the corresponding winning streak reward.
Activity time: 2014/3/1-2014/3/5

prompts: There are %0 free guessing opportunities left today
After checking, you will spend %0 Gold to automatically purchase a qualification to participate.
After checking, consume %0 Gold to automatically purchase fault tolerance times.

440001.name: Whole Server Limited Purchase
440001.description:
1. During the 8 days of event, players can participate.
2. There is a daily limited chances of purchase for each player. Player cannot purchase when purchase chance is 0.
3. There is a limited amount of each item pack(this amount is for all server). Player cannot purchase when amount is 0.
4. During event, all item packs are available immediately without additional spend requirements.
5. The amount of item packs and purchase chances reset at 18:30 daily.

prompts: Confirm to spend %0 to purchase this gift pack?

450001.name: Ultimate BP
450001.description:
1. After event startsclear stagescan randomly get different amount of Ice Crystal Pieces. Use it to redeem gift pack and partners.

2. Gift packs are cycle rewards, redeem partners and claim gift packdoes not consume Ice Crystal Pieces, there will be a suprising gift pack on the fifth day after event starts.

3. Collecting enough Ice Crystal Pieces to joinrank, can obtain rank gift pack.

4.The title will be expired by 30 days

extra.rank_desc:
1. Ice Crystal Fragments stop counting 5 minutes before the event ends.
2. The ranking refreshes every 5 minutes.
3. When the event ends, ranking rewards are sent by mail.

470001.name: Mysterious Puzzle
470001.description:
During event, top-up can get points. Points can activate puzzles and redeem gift
Activate all puzzles can get Yoruichi Title, title will last for 10 days
Puzzles will be activated in sequence
Activate puzzle or redeem rewards will cost points

480001.name: Big Turntable
480001.description:
Activity time: 2014/5/20-2014/5/24
During the event, players who have accumulated online time of 1 hours can participate in a lucky draw.
You can also get 10 lucky points and 2 points by participating in a lucky draw to obtain items.
Consume 100 lucky points to participate in a lucky mystery draw (lucky points and points will not be obtained)
During the event, players can consume Gold to draw Gold.
You can also get 5 Gold Value and 10 points by participating in the Gold lottery to obtain items.
Consume 150 Gold Value to participate in a Gold mystery lottery (no Gold Value and points will be obtained)
Points can be clicked on the redemption button on the event interface to enter the points store to redeem partners, Zanpakutō and items
Note: You can only have one of the same partner and Zanpakutō, please be careful when exchanging them.

1.name: {"index":0,"indexType":3,"getType":4,"value":100,"des":"Lucky Value"}
1.tname: [{"index":1,"indexType":3,"getType":1,"condition":[{"type":2,"value":3600}],"getChip":[{"index":0,"value":10},{"index":98,"value":2}],"award":[21401486],"des":"Lucky points %0 and points %1 can be obtained through the lottery.","flag":[1,0,0,0,1,0,0,0,1,0,0,0,1,0,0,0]}]

490001.name: Team Buy
490001.description:
During the event period, you can register to join Group Purchase; after successfully registered, then you can buy.
The more people registered for the event means the price will become cheaper.                                                                                                                             Registered time is everyday from Midnight to 9 PM, purchase time is everyday from 9:01 PM to 11:59 PM.

prompts.strEndBuy: Sorry, Group Purchase ended already, please wait for next phase.

500002.name: Top-Up Ranking
500002.description:
1. Top up gold to get points, 1 gold= 1 point, cumulate certain points to win rewards and partner.
2. The ranking list will refresh every 5 minutes, system will stop calculating 5 minutes before the end of the event.
3. The result of the event will come out 5 minutes before the end of the event and rewards will be sent via in-game mail.

510001.name: Top-up Ranking
510001.description:
1. You get 1 Golden Card every 12 hours.
2. Flipping a Golden Card costs 100 Gold and gives 2 Points. Every 100 Points gives 1 free flip.
3. After you flip a Golden Card, you can remove rewards you do not want. Each removal costs 25 Gold, and you can remove up to 2 rewards.

530001.name: Urahara Shop
530001.tname: Urahara Shop Value Deals (choose one type)
530001.description:
1. You get 1 free normal draw every 12 hours.
2. Spend Gold on a normal draw to get a random picture. Duplicate pictures can appear, and each picture gives its own reward.
3. A lucky draw always gives a picture you do not own yet, but you cannot use it after you collect every picture.
4. Finish set picture groups to exchange them for chest rewards.
5. Use Complete and Exchange to spend Gold, fill missing pictures, and claim rewards, but you will not get achievement points.
6. The first time you open a picture, you get 1 achievement point. Reach 25 points to claim the grand achievement reward without spending pictures.
530001.tip: 1. You cannot purchase other funds after purchasing the growth fund 2. Every day 00: 30 points will be returned to the fund reward %0 gift certificate 3 through the system email. The number of returns is 30 times 4. The event offline will not affect the reward distribution until the rewards are distributed.

520001.name: Urahara Shop
520001.tname: Urahara Shop Super Value Discount (Can only purchase once)
520001.description: 1. Players can spend gold to upgrade Hogu to higher Tier; 2. If you equip the Hogu on to Partners, you cannot upgrade to higher tier; please unequipp and place in backpack to upgrade Hogu; 3. Tier 3 - 12 Hogu can at most upgrade to Tier 12 Hogu; 4. If you want to upgrade Tier 5 or above Hogu to higher Tier, you need to upgrade to max level first; 5. Players can purchase limited amount of discount price Hogu Enhancement Talisman.
520001.tip: 1. If you purchase growth fund then you cannot purchase other funds. 2. The growth funds reward of %0 coupons will be sent everyday at 12:30 AM via system mail 3. The reward will be sent 30 times. 4. Even if you log off during the event period, you'll still receive the reward until all 30 installments are sent

540001.name: Treasure Hunt
540001.description:
Players can get 1 free chance of Treasure Hunt every 12 hours. You can refresh the final reward before event starts. Free reset is available when you reach the final grid.
Spend Gold to move random steps on the map. Use Super Hunt to select steps.
You can receive random rewards when you step on normal maps. Rewards from golden map is constant. Reach the final grid to receive final rewards including Lv.8 Spirit Stone Box, Lv.6 Hogu Box, Hogu Enhance Talisman, Basic Fury Stone, Hōgyoku Hollow Spirit, Golden Reishi.

550001.name: World Cup
550001.description:
Please select a team to sponsor within the first 5 days of the event.
Once you sponsor a team in a slot, you cannot switch that slot to a different team.
Spend Gold to unlock the alternate team slot and sponsor a second team.
If a team you support wins, all sponsored Gold is returned and you also receive the corresponding Coupon rebate.
Top up 40,000 Gold within the first 5 days of the event to recruit a special character.
550001.tip: Support a team during the first 5 days, spend 1,000 Gold to unlock the alternate team slot, and top up 40,000 Gold during the sponsorship period to recruit a special character.

560001.name: Strongest King
560001.description:
Buy Partners during the event.
You can also buy Epic EXP Scrolls and Souls, with 2 free draws each day.
Each Partner can only be bought once.

570001.name: Treasure Gamble
570001.description:
1. During the first 5 days, players can buy chests with Gold.
2. Each Ticket costs 500 Points. Tickets last for 1 day.
3. During the event, 10% of the Gold spent will be added to the jackpot.
4. During the first 5 days, the player with the winning Ticket is chosen at 00:00 and gets the whole jackpot.

580001.name: A Perfect Match
580001.description:
Players who met the requirements can obtain roses and can purchase rose giftpacks.
Each time player met a requirement, a level of purchasing qualification for rose giftpacks will be unlocked.
During the event the supervalue store will be available and players can directly buy supervalue giftpacks to meet the requirements.
Players can obtain rewards and roses by purchasing rose giftpacks.
When players obtained a certain amount of roses, Shinigami Yoruichi and Shinigami Urahara will be able for exchange

590001.name: Lucky Slot Machine
590001.description:
1. Players have 2 free chances of pulling each day.
2. The winning percentage is 100% and players will obtain 10 points in each time of pulling.
3. The points will be doubled once there is a Kon Head in the result.
4. Players can exchange exclusive equipment with points obtained.

600001.name: Rapid Remodeling
600001.description:
1. There'll be a 20% discount on the reset price of partner modification dojo.
2. The loot of modifying fragments for the partners in the event will be doubled and the reset price of them will enjoy a 50% discount.
3. In the fragment shop players can buy modifying fragments for the partners in the event and the chances will reset at 0:00.

610001.name: Privilege Rental
610001.description:
1. Players can use gold to hire partners.
2. If the partner is expired, then s/he will be unable to join battles. You can renew the partner with gold.
3. The partner you hired will have the same level with the main character, once you spend enough gold 
4. You can dismiss the hired partner, after you've dismissed a hired partner, the accumulated gold

620001.name: Halloween 1
620001.description:
1. Each day, players can claim 1 free random gift pack. Top up any amount of Gold to claim the daily top-up gift pack.
2. Spend Gold to buy the daily benefit pack. The rewards change every day. After buying the daily benefit pack enough times, you can claim a limited gift pack for free. You can also buy the limited gift pack directly with Gold.
3. When all players on the server buy the daily benefit pack enough times, every player can claim the server mystery reward.

630001.name: Halloween Event 2
630001.description:
1. Every 100 Gold you top up gives 1 free blessing chance. More top-ups give more chances.
2. Each blessing gives 10 Temple EXP and 1 draw.
3. Reach the listed EXP goals to claim Blessing Card rewards. The temple levels up as EXP grows, up to level 5.

640001.name: Halloween Event 3
640001.description:
1. Finish daily tasks to get matches. Matches light lanterns for free and give you 1 lantern plus a random reward from the normal lantern pool.
2. You can also spend Gold to light lanterns and pull a random reward from the full lantern pool.
3. Lanterns count toward the ranking. If the whole server lights enough lanterns each day, every player can claim a server reward pack.
4. Each day, 3 lucky players from the event will win lucky gift packs by mail.

650001.name: Halloween Event 4
650001.description:
1. You get 2 free card flips each day.
2. Tap a card back to flip it and get random items, matches, and 10-20 koi fish.
3. After all 20 cards are open, you can reset the board and keep playing.
4. Collect enough koi fish to exchange for koi gift packs and the final Partner reward.

660001.name: Hueco Mundo Trial
660001.description:
Clear the matching Hueco Mundo stages during the event to earn Points. Every 10 Points gives 1 draw, and One-Key Draw uses all current Points.
If you do not have enough Points, you can spend Gold to draw. Gold draws have a better chance to give top rewards and can also give 0-3 Trial Fragments.
Spend Trial Fragments to exchange for Senbonzakura. Finish the listed tasks to claim achievement gift packs.
Hire the matching Partners from the featured lineup to claim their gift packs. Each Partner gift pack can only be claimed once.

670001.name: Hueco Mundo Treasure
670001.description:
1. If the daily cumulative recharge reaches the specified amount, you can receive a recharge gift and 2 trial fragments
2. If the turntable lottery reaches the specified number of times, you can receive a free lottery gift pack. You can receive 10 fragments in each round, and it will be automatically reset after receiving it. You can receive it repeatedly.
3.Complete daily tasks to get free lottery draws
4. Trial fragments can be exchanged for Senbonzakura and fragment treasure chests. Patch Up the Pieces costs 300 Gold per missing fragment.

680001.name: Soul King Legend
680001.description:
1. During the event, top up 200 gold to win bonus and top-up gifts.
2. During the event, consume 500 gold each day to win supervalue gifts.
3. Players can exchange coupons with vitality once each day.
4. Join Lucky Turntable to win rewards, each try consumes 50 gold. Complete 4 tasks to unlock the giftpack.

690001.name: Soul King Legend
690001.description:
1. Winning will join next round, losing will end the game. Draw won't count. Each round has 5 stages.
2. Each Janken will consume 1 chance and there'll be 5 free chances each day. each chance will consume 50 gold.
3. Use Tokens to exchange rewards, rewards will be different every day.
4. Join Lucky Turntable to win rewards, each try consumes 50 gold. Complete 4 tasks to unlock the giftpack.

messages: Janken chances used up, spend %0 gold to continue?
%0 shop will have different items to sell each day

700001.name: Christmas Gift Pack
700001.description:
1. During the event, topping up 100 Gold in a single charge each day lets you claim the daily top-up reward. The reward includes items and 1 Christmas wish chance.
2. During the event, logging in each day lets you claim the daily login reward. The reward includes items and 1 Christmas wish chance.
3. During the event, you can buy special sale items in the daily hot sale each day. Each special item can be bought only once. The hot sale items are different every day.
4. During the event, when you buy enough special sale items in total, you can claim the matching reward. The reward includes items and 1 Christmas wish chance.

710001.name: Christmas Event 2
710001.description:
1, each recharge of 100 Gold can get one free wish.
2, players do not have free wishing times, and can spend 20 Gold to make a wish once. You can get a bell and a prop as a reward once you make a wish.
3. Players can exchange bells for prop rewards. The top ten players with the total number of bells will enter the ranking list. After the event, the ranking rewards will be sent via email.
4, all players in the server can get corresponding rewards if the number of bells accumulated reaches a certain number.

720001.name: Christmas Carnival
720001.description:
1, players can obtain greeting cards through the Christmas wishing event. You can use greeting cards to refresh the original discounts of products and partners, without a refresh limit.
2. The cost of greeting cards will increase after each refresh. It will remain unchanged after the cost reaches 10 greeting cards. The minimum discount is 3-5.
3. Players can only purchase goods once. After purchasing, they cannot refresh the goods with discounts. 
4. After the player purchases six products, he must click the refresh product button before new products will appear. The cooling time has not expired, and you need to spend 50 Gold to refresh.

730001.name: New Year's Day Activities 1
730001.description:
1. During the event, you can receive a login gift pack. The gift pack can only be received once. The gift pack contains prop rewards and a hammer reward.
2. Players can get a hammer for free for every recharge of 100 Gold or more during the event. The hammer can be used to smash silver eggs and golden eggs.
3, players have 5 opportunities to smash copper eggs for free every day. After smashing, the cooling time will enter, and then they can smash again. Copper eggs cannot be smashed with Gold or hammers.
4, players can use hammers to smash silver eggs and golden eggs. If there are not enough hammers, they will use Gold to smash silver eggs 20 Gold once, and golden eggs 100 Gold once.
5. You can get egg coupons by smashing eggs. If you have the corresponding number of egg coupons, you can receive the corresponding rewards. The rewards can only be received once.

740001.name: New Year's Day Double Flying
740001.description:
1. During the event period, players must invite friends before they can purchase gifts to give to the friends they want to give to. Gifts cannot be purchased without inviting friends.
2. After a player gives a gift to a friend, both the player and the friend can get the purchased gift. The friend's gift will be sent by email.
3, the player who gives the gift can also get the good guy card, and the friend who is given the gift can get the charm card.
4, when the number of good person cards and charm cards reaches a certain number, you can receive the corresponding rewards. The rewards can only be received once.

750001.name: Combine Task
750001.description:
1. Compelete tasks to win corresponding rewards and extra draw chances.
2. Buy Task Tokens to complete corresponding tasks and the tokens can be bought once each day.
3. Complete all tasks to win ultimate reward.
4. All data will reset in the next day.

800001.name: Dreams Come True
800001.description:
1. During the event, players can obtain zodiac signs and points through the Star Wish Wheel. Different wheels can obtain different zodiac signs and points.
2, Star Wish Wheel has a certain number of free tickets every day, and different wheels have different free times every day. Gold coins will be spent when the free times are used up.
3. Depending on the number of constellations players obtain, they can be redeemed for rewards in Star Rewards. Partners and Zanpakutō can only be exchanged once.
4, players are ranked according to the points they obtain. Players in the leaderboard can receive ranking rewards, which will be sent by email.

810001.name: Halloween 1
810001.description:
1. Log in to the game every day during the event period to receive login rewards. This reward can only be claimed once a day.
2. During the event period, players who reach level 30 can receive a New Year’s cute pet. This cute pet can only be received once.
3, players can cultivate cute pets, and the fragments required to cultivate cute pets can only be obtained through New Year activities.
4. Players who complete tasks during the event period can obtain task rewards. This reward can only be claimed once.

820001.name: New Year Event 2
820001.description:
1. During the event period, players can obtain prop rewards and points by lighting lanterns, and the points can be used to redeem rewards.
2. After the player clicks all the lanterns, they must be reset to continue the game. Points will not be reset.
3, players have a certain number of free times and free resets every day.
4. If the points in the whole server reach a certain level, you can receive the corresponding reward. This reward can only be received once.

830001.name: New Year firecrackers
830001.description:
1. During the event period, players can get prop rewards by lighting firecrackers.
2. When all the firecrackers in each horizontal row, column and diagonal angle are lit, you can receive the corresponding gift pack.
3. After the player clicks all the firecrackers, they must reset before they can continue the game.
4. Light certain firecrackers to get the ultimate prize, which will be sent via email.

840001.name: New Year's Double Bonus
840001.description:
1. Log in every day during the event to claim the login reward. This reward can be claimed once per day.
2. After you buy all current items, you can claim the ultimate reward. This reward can be claimed only once.
3. Each item can be bought only once. You can go back and buy items you did not buy before.
4. When you buy enough items, you can claim the grand ultimate reward. This reward can be claimed only once.

860001.name: Limited-Time Rebate
860001.description:
1. Sign in for certain times to receive corresponding rewards.
2. Top up certain amount of gold to receive corresponding rewards.
3. Spend certain amount of gold to receive corresponding rewards.
4. Cumulate certain amount of top-up and consumption of gold to receive the ultimate reward.

850001.name: Limited-Time Draw
850001.description:
1. Each day players can conduct normal gold draw once when topped up for a certain amount of gold.
2. During the event, players can conduct advanced gold draw each day when topped up a certain amount.
3. There're chance limits for both normal and advanced draws.
4. Draw chances, chance limits and top-up records will reset at midnight each day

870001.name: Daily Rebate
870001.description:
1. Players can receive daily login reward during the event.
2. During the event, top up certain amount to receive corresponding reward.
3. The reward and topup record will reset at midnight each day.

880001.name: Growth Plan
880001.description:
1. Top up a cumulative 100 Gold during the event to unlock the Growth Plan purchase.
2. Buy the Growth Plan for 100 Gold.
3. After buying it, reach Lv.20, 25, 30, 35, 40, and 50 to claim 100 Gold at each milestone.
4. Each reward can be claimed once. Complete all milestones to receive 600 Gold in total.

890001.name: New Year's Double Bonus
890001.description:
1. Log in every day during the event to claim the login reward. This reward can be claimed once per day.
2. After you buy all current items, you can claim the ultimate reward. This reward can be claimed only once.
3. Each item can be bought only once. You can go back and buy items you did not buy before.
4. When you buy enough items, you can claim the grand ultimate reward. This reward can be claimed only once.

900001.name: Soul Reaper Gift Pack
900001.description:
1. During the event, top up certain amount to receive the topup chest. Receive 3 chests to receive extra achievement reward.
2. Buy all chests for the day to receive daily reward.
3. Complete all corresponding daily tasks to receive achievement rewards for free.

910001.name: Treasure Chest
910001.description:
1. Players will have free draws each day and items will be refreshed after each draw.
2. All event data will be refreshed on 0:00 at midnight except the points you get in the event;
3. Uncovering reward zones will consume gold and you're required to refresh before you uncover them. The action can't be reverted.
4. You'll get 1 point each time you spend 1 gold, and you can use points to exchange items.

920001.name: Daily Hero
920001.description:
1. 1 gold=1 point, you can redeem the rewards by points
2. Partners and Zanbakutous can be redeemed once only.
3. The points will be eliminated when the event is over. Please use them during the event.

930001.name: Pyramid
930001.description:
1. Top up 200 gold to win a draw chance. Player must top up multiple of 200 to win lottery chances.
2. You can win items and points by conduct lottery draws. Regardless of the results, lottery chances will be consumed. You can use points to exchange rewards.
3. When a player has won the item on the far left of each row, the next draw will be in the upper row.
4. If a player has failed to do so, s/he will return to the bottom and start over.

940001.name: Rush into Seireitei
940001.description:
During the event, spend Vitality to exchange attack chances and deal damage on NPCs within stages
Insufficient damage will lead to a failed attack and attack chances won't be consumed.
The NPCs in different stages have different HP and you'll receive corresponding reward and point after finished
You can exchange for items in the shop with the points you get.
After the event, rewards will be sent according to the final point ranking.

messages: Are you sure to spend %0 Vitality to exchange for %1?

950001.name: Astrology House
950001.description:
1. Claim a login reward each day.
2. Tap "Horoscope" to earn points and Signs. The board refreshes after you light all Signs, and you can also refresh it by hand.
3. Match Signs to earn Stars. Spend Stars in the shop for items.
4. You get a set number of free Horoscope chances.
5. Free chances and login rewards reset at 00:00 each day.

960001.name: Blade Gallery
960001.description:
1.When accumulative consumption amount reached requirement, players can activate Blade Gallery page.
2. When accumulative top-up amount reached requirement, players can activate Hero Gallery page.
3. When current page is activated and all items are collected, players will be qualified to receive the rewards. All rewards can be received once only.

970001.name: Cool Summer
970001.description:
1. Use Gold to open shells, the player can only get rewards when 2 same items were showed. Therere free chances each day.
2. Use gold to refresh the shells, you can see all the rewards on the Shelves.
3. You can select the goods you want with gold and you can 3 at most. The selected rewards will be shown in the next round.
4. 1 Gold = 1 Point, use points to exchange rewards.
5. All free chances and shells will refresh at midnight.

980001.name: Daily Gift
980001.description:
1. When your daily top-up reached a certain amount, you can unlock giftpacks.
2. When daily top-up and the number of players who topped up reached a certain amount, the corresponding giftpack will be unlocked.
3. When the topping up players are not enough to unlock the giftpack, you need to spend gold to get the giftpack.
4. You can also buy server giftpack with gold directly.
5. All data will refresh at midnight each day.

1020001.name: First Top-Up Gift
1020001.description:
1. Top up any amount to receive a reward (first top up only).
2. When you have cumulated certain amount of top-up, you can claim corresponding giftpack.
3. All rewards can be claimed only once.

1030001.name: Brush Happy
1030001.description:
1. Before buying you can click "Refresh" for discounts. The refreshed price will be lower.
2. There's a lowest discount for each good and when it was reached, then you can't refresh for discount anymore.
3. After buying all goods you must click refresh to get a new list of the discounted goods and refreshes in CD time will consume certain amount of gold.
4. Players reached certain VIP level can buy exclusive chest for once each day.
5.All goods will be refreshed at midnight

1040001.name: Blade Gallery
1040001.description:
1. During the event, you can get 1 lottery chance each day by topping up 200 gold.
2. Please select the giftpack you need before drawing. You can draw for the giftpack once only each time.
3. Based on the reward rate you selected you'll get corresponding rewards. The minimum reward rate is twofold.

1050001.name: Game
1050001.description:
1. Click "Play" to start the game. Each pumpkin throw uses 1 chance and starts the timer. You can throw 1 pumpkin per game.
2. Press Space to throw the pumpkin. If you hit the ghost, you get 1 Candy. The pumpkin will be thrown automatically when the timer ends.
3. Collect Candy and trade it for rewards.
4. You get 2 free chances each day. Each extra chance costs 50 Gold.

1060001.name: Top-Up
1060001.description:
1. During the event, 1 Gold = 1 Point. Use Points in the shop to get rewards.
2. Top up the required amount to activate the Spiders. Click them to claim rewards. They reset at midnight.
3. During the event, top up the required amount of Gold to claim the Pumpkin Pack. (One-time only)

1070001.name: Shopping Cart
1070001.description:
1. During the event, each time you spend 2 gold, you'll get 1 point -- the point will stack with the top-up points and can be used for exchanging rewards in Point Shop.
2. All giftpacks in "Candy Zone" and "Pumpkin Garden" shall be added to the Cart before buying, which means they can't be bought directly.
3. When your total consumption reaches 5,000 gold, you can get a 1,500 gold discount. Please be sure that the discount won't stack.
4. Please be noticed that the discount giftpack in "Pumpkin Garden" can only be used for single consumption and the "Double Point" reward in "Candy Zone" can be stacked.
5. When buying the items in "Super Rewards", you won't get cart discounts and point rewards.

1080001.name: Thank You
1080001.description:
1. During the event, when characters created in the Witness Zone reach a certain number of days, you can claim a reward.
2. During the event, when your level reaches a certain milestone, you can claim a reward.
3. During the event, you can only claim the reward for your current VIP level. Each VIP reward can be claimed only once.
4. During the event, when your VIP level reaches Super VIP, you can claim a reward.
5. During the event, all rewards can be claimed only once.

1090001.name: Thanksgiving Feast
1090001.description:
1. When accumulative top-up reaches the required amount, you can light up the puzzle. Each reward can be claimed only once.
2. When the puzzle is complete, you can get the Gikon. The Gikon can be obtained only once.
3. When accumulative top-up reaches the required amount, you can get an extra reward.

1100001.name: Treasure Hunt
1100001.description:
1. Tap Explore to search for treasure. You get 1 free dig each day.
2. If you find a Bomb, the run ends. Refresh to start a new hunt.
3. Tap Open All to collect every treasure. This costs Gold.
4. 1 Gold = 1 Point. Spend Points in the shop.
5. Treasure progress and free chances reset at midnight. Buying treasure directly also adds the same amount to your Points.

1110001.name: Snow Battle
1110001.description:
1. Click on start to enter countdown, snowball will be thrown overtime.
2. When game starts, click on Space to throw snowball, hit different positions to get different points.
3. Each day players can get 1 free game chance, chance will be reset at midnight each day.
4. During the event, points will not be reset, cumulative points can receive corresponding rewards.

1120001.name: Christmas Fun
1120001.description:
1. Single top-up reached a certain amount can activate giftback, have no time limit.
2. Finish consume or top-up task can get corresponding giftback once.
3. The rewards will be invalid if players didn't receive rewards, players can only receive rewards once.
4. All buttons will be reset at midnight each day, please receive rewards in time.

1130001.name: Christmas Socks
1130001.description:
1. Complete daily quests to receive rewards and Rice Balls.
2. Collect Rice Balls to receive rewards.
3. At the end of the event, depending on your ranking in the Rice Balls you will receive rewards.
4. 10 minutes before the end of the event the ranking will no longer be updated, players in the Top 3 will receive the title "Family Reunion".
5. Collect enough Rice Balls to receive Ultimate Rewards.

1140001.name: Sled
1140001.description:
1. Click start to enter convey countdown, receive extra Xmas cards according to sledge quality when it ended.
2. Players can cost gold to refresh sledge quality before conveyance, being robbed will lose Xmas cards.
3. There're certain rob chances each day, rob others successfully can get extra Xmas cards.
4. You can only rob visible sledge in the snow, use one-click reach will not be robbed and ignore countdown.
5. All Xmas cards can exchange gifts in shop, consume 1 gold can receive 1 Xmas card.

language.snatchTimesLess: Today remaining rob chances used up
language.curWheelSnatched: Have robbed this round, can not rob again
snatchState: This sledge has robbed by others
language.log1: %0 robbed you,%1 Xmas card was stolen.
language.log2: You robbed sledge of %0,get %1 Xmas card

1150001.name: New Year Sign-In
1150001.description:
1. Sign in everyday to get rewards, late sign-in will consume gold or coupons.
2. Meet requirements to get corresponding giftpacks, all giftpacks can be claimed once only during the event.
3. Special sales will all be limited sales that subject to current price. The chances will reset at 0:00, midnight.

1160001.name: New Year Beast
1160001.description:
1. Single top-up will randomly give you gold or fund giftpack. Single giftpack can be claimed unlimitedly.
2. Rewards won't stack, so don’t forget to claim your rewards when the button is lit.
3. Shoot arrows towards New Year Beasts to randomly get rewards, each shot will consume 1 arrow.
4. When you’ve topped up for a certain amount, you can get corresponding giftpacks and they'll reset on 0:00 at midnight.

1170001.name: New Year Lucky Bag
1170001.description:
1. Use gold to refresh rewards within Lucky Bags.
2. You'll get random rewards by opening Lucky Bags, one-click open will be discounted.
3. You have certain free chances each day and they'll reset on 0:00 at midnight.
4. Open Red Packets to get points and 1 gold = 1 point.
5. You can exchange for rewards with points you have.

1180001.name: New Year Fund
1180001.description:
1.During the event,accumulated top-up reaches certain amount can receive corresponding gift money rewards.
2.Accumulated top-up reaches certain amount can purchase fund. The rewards will be returned in 30 days.
3.Players can receive the fund from the in-game mail from the next day.
4.Players can only purchase one fund. The fund can only be purchased for one time.

1190001.name: New Year Monopoly
1190001.description:
1. You can roll the dice for free every 2 hours. Use Super Dice with Gold to choose your roll. 
2. Finish the board to get 2000 Points. 
3. Use "Open All" to get the rewards from the gold tiles and 2000 Points.
4. Use your Points in the shop to get partners, Zanpakuto, and other items.
5. The board resets every day at midnight.

1200001.name: Gifts from Heaven
1200001.description:
1. Stay online for required time to get online giftpack and win the qualification of buying supervalue giftpack!
2. You can get Almighty Egg from the online giftpack and you can buy the supervalue giftpack twice each day.
3. Login everyday during the event to get free giftpack. The giftpack is limited and don’t miss it!
4. You can buy the ultimate giftpack once each day and all giftpacks will reset on 0:00 midnight.

1210001.name: Gifts from Heaven
1210001.description:
1. Top up certain amount to get Blue Egg, which can be used for exchanging Ultimate Reward and Easter Gift.
2. Spend corresponding amount of gold to get Purple Egg, which can be used for Snap Up and exchanging Ultimate Reward.
3. Exchanging giftpacks will consume corresponding eggs, when you don’t have enough eggs for the exchange, the system will use Almighty Eggs for completion.
4. During the event, eggs you have will not be emptied and you can't use Almighty Eggs to complement for the Ultimate Reward.

1220001.name: Gifts from Heaven
1220001.description:
1. You can get 1 of the rewards by opening Eggs with Gold. Use "Open 10 Times" to get a 10% discount.
2. You can open 1 Bronze Egg for free after some time. You get Points by opening Eggs.
3. You can exchange your Points for rewards. You can check your Points and rank on the ranking list.
4. On the last day of the event, the ranking stops updating at 23:50. Rewards will be sent by mail at 00:00.

1230001.name: Personal Top-Up
1230001.description:
1. Top up 1 gold to get 1 point of Reio Power, top up certain amount to get free chances in Reio's Treasure.
2. By using Reio Power you can forge Zanpakutos; by activating each stage of rewards you can get extra giftpacks.
3. You can exchange for giftpacks with Reio Power in Reio's Treasure, forging Zanpakuto or exchanging for rewards will both cost Reio Power.
4. Based on the zanpakuto's level, after the event, you can get certain portion of golds you've topped up in return.

1240001.name: Labor Day Cultivation
1240001.description:
1. Each time you weed or water you'll get Growth Points, which will be calculated into Total Growth.
2. Each day you have free watering chances and by auto clearing stages, you'll get extra herbicides.
3. When Total Growth reached required amount, you can claim corresponding giftpacks.

1250001.name: Labor Day Spending
1250001.description:
1. For topups, 1 Gold = 1 Nutrition; for consumption, 4 Gold = 1 Nutrition.
2. When single topup reached required amount, you can claim corresponding giftpacks.
3. When your Nutrition has reached certain amount you can claim corresponding rewards.
4. When you have reached claiming requirements for multiple times, the rewards won't stack.

1260001.name: Labor Day Spending
1260001.description:
1. Exchanging chests will consume related items, when you don’t have enough items, you can use gold to fill the gap.
2. Different rewards were included and after resetting, all rewards will be changed.
3. All chests will reset after 0:00 at midnight, each day you have 2 free refresh chances.
4. Buying partner will give you points and nutrition.

language.costTip: Are you sure to spend %0 gold?

1270001.name: Labor Day Spending
1270001.description:
1. When single topup has reached corresponding amount, you can receive reward and rice dumpling.
2. You can use rice dumplings to exchange rewards in the shop and rice dumplings you've collected will be calculated into total dumplings collected.
3. Receive all-server dumpling rewards will not cost dumplings, the giftpack can be received only once.
4. During the event, accumulate top up any amount for 5 days to get rewards.

1280001.name: Labor Day Spending
1280001.description:
1. Click Start to start race, get different grade and reward according to the time spent
2. Please claim your reward before starting next round, you have certain free races everyday during the event.
3. You can spend gold to cheer for your boats before the race begins, in doing so you can accelerate your boat and get yourself cheer rewards.
4. Collect certain Morale to get extra Boat Coins, after each round of the race the Morale will reset.
5. Water flow direction will change randomly, it will affect boat's speed.
6. Purchase Dragon Boat Rewards to get boat coin, consume 1 gold to get 1 coin.

1290001.name: Hueco Mundo Treasure Hunt
1290001.description:
1. Based on your VIP level, different maps will be unlocked. Before start botting, please choose the reward type and duration of botting. After starting botting, you can't change them.
2. You can only choose one map for botting. Botting will consume certain amount of silver.
3. When botting is finished, you can claim rewards. Claiming rewards with gold will give you a chance to obtain double reward, and 1 extra Talisman of Dark and 1 extra Fragment of Light.

1300001.name: Hueco Mundo Treasure Hunt
1300001.description:
1. Each time you draw in Dark Altar you will obtain a Talisman of Dark and in Light Altar you'll get a Fragment of Light.
2. You can exchange for rewards in Shop of Dark with Talisman of Dark as well as using Fragment of Light in Shop of Light.
3. Exchanging Partner will consume corresponding items.

1310001.name: Carnival of Souls
1310001.description:
1. You can receive 1 gold reward and 3 silver rewards each time you purchase.
2. You will see all the possible rewards in the Preview Area and you can swap current rewards when refreshed successfully.
3. The rewards will not be refreshed automatically after your purchase, but you can purchase your current rewards repeatedly.

1320001.name: Carnival of Souls 2
1320001.description:
1. Each three force represents three different giftpacks.
2. Any giftpack you purchase will give you Kon Fragments, which can be exchanged for rewards in Supply Area.
3. The partner rewards in the left side can only be claimed by exchange of fragments.

1330001.name: Carnival of Souls 3
1330001.description:
1. When the single recharge reaches certain amount, you can claim the corresponding rewards for one time and the rewards are stackable.
2. If the times claiming rewards match the times completing recharges, the player's records in the event will be reset.

1340001.name: Zanpakuto 2-in-1
1340001.description:
1. Recharge required gold to claim corresponding giftpack and zanpakuto.
2. When the players in the server have collected required zanpakuto, server reward will be unlocked.
3. Players who have collected zanpakuto will be eligible for claiming rewards.
4. Zanpakuto is an event item. Collection and reward claiming status will reset on 0:00 midnight everyday.

1350001.name: Zanpakuto 2-in-1
1350001.description:
1. Recharge to unlock corresponding zanpakuto puzzle and win free moves.
2. Use gold to unlock puzzles or move.
3. Each move gives you 1 point, which can be used for exchanging for items in the shop.
4. In each round there will be 40 moves and after that the next round will begin.
5. Total moves will be counted till the end of the event.
6. Each puzzle will sum up, example: to unlock 4 puzzles will cost 4250 gold total.

1360001.name: Everyone Is Looting 1
1360001.description:
1. Receive a gift-pack once daily after logging in. Fail to receive gift-packs consecutively will be regarded as a waiver.
2. If a single top-up reaches a certain amount, you can freely receive a gift-pack for once daily
3. Completing the highest top-up amount will give access to freely purchase a gift-pack for once daily in Event 2

1370001.name: Everyone Is Looting 2
1370001.description:
1. Players can freely purchase a gift-pack for once daily in Event 1
2. All gift-packs will be reset at 0:00 daily
3. Purchased gift-packs can be replaced by refreshing
4. A successfully purchasesd gift-pack will result in 1 credit which can be used to exchange rewards in Shop

1380001.name: Halloween Gift 1
1380001.description:
1. During the event you can claim Halloween gifts for free, which will differ according to your VIP level.
2. When the top-up reaches a certain amount you can claim top-up giftpacks and the finest Ghost Masks rewards repeatedly
3. The status of all the rewards will be reset at 12 am daily and the Ghost Masks you have will be reserved till the end of the event.

1390001.name: Halloween Gift 2
1390001.description:
1. Consume Gold to spin the plate once and you will randomly obtain a giftpack and a Ghost Mask
2. The system will not refresh a new wave of rewards unless all the rewards in the plate are spinned and claimed
3. Each time when rewards are refreshed there're always 8 random Tool packs appearing in the plate
4. Ghost Masks can be exchanged into Tools in Point Shop, which will consume a number of Ghost Masks
5. All the status will be refreshed and reset at 12 am daily and the number of masks you have will be reserved till the end of the event

1400001.name: Thanksgiving 1
1400001.description:
1. During the event, log in everyday to receive a Thanksgiving Gift Pack
2. Thanksgiving Gift Packs can only be claimed orderly. Log in for 5 days to claim the Ultimate Chest

1410001.name: Thanksgiving 2
1410001.description:
1. Click cards to flip them. Each flip will randomly result in a set of rewards and a colored card
2. Use Red Cards to exchange rewards in Card Shop. Exchange other colored cards for Red Cards3. When top-up reaches a certain amount, can have a certain times to freely flip the cards

1420001.name: Thanksgiving 3
1420001.description:
1. Personal and overall daily top-up will be recorded in the bar below, which will be reset at 0:00 daily
2. If the overall top-up amount reaches a certain ratio, every player is able to claim gift packs
3. Players who top-up a certain amount in a day can receive two gift packs at one time
4. 0 Top-up players in a day can claim the gift packs on the left only
5. The number on the bar indicates current claiming times of gift packs. Invalid when expired

1430001.name: 2017 New Year 1
1430001.description:
1. Complete the quests every day to receive points. The quests will be reset at 00:00 each day.
2. Use your points to exchange them for chests. Only 1 per day.
3. The same quest will not give you extra points.

1440001.name: 2017 New Year 2
1440001.description:
1. Depending on the single charge amount you receive a gift or a great gift.
2. Rewards are random.
3. There are 2 types of rewards, which can be received several times a day.
4. The total recharge will reset at 00:00 each day. Use your points to redeem them in the store.

1450001.name: 2017 New Year 3
1450001.description:
1. Each lantern contains different rewards. Refresh the lanterns to reset the rewards.
2. You can only select one of the rewards from a lantern, and buy after having selected all the rewards of the lanterns.
3. The price varies according to discounts. Use refresh discount to lower the price.
4. Spend gold in this events will give you points. Gather certain points to exchange Gifts

1460001.name: April Fools' Day 1
1460001.description:
1. Top- up required Gold to claim Fools' chest once per day.
2. Accumulatively top- up required Gold in event to claim splendid rewards.
3. You can active a Fools' Box every day. Top-up 5 days in a row to activate all boxes.

1470001.name: April Fools' Day 2
1470001.description:
1. You have 1 free Roll chance everyday. Activating Fools' Box gives an extra Roll chance.
2. Spend required Gold to get Roll chance. You can possibly roll a smiling faces to get high points. 
3. You can refresh items and points before you exchange for diaplayed rewards.
4. You can possibly get Roll chance after you exchange for rewards. Points are used to exchange for diaplayed rewards and Shop rewards.

1480001.name: Karakura Town Festival
1480001.description:
1. Log in or top-up everyday to claim sugar giftpack.
2. Top-up required amount to claim each giftpack once per day.
3. Login giftpack must be claimed in time once per day.
4. Top-up giftpack can be claim before event ends. Sugar only accumulates when event is open.

1490001.name: Karakura Town Festival
1490001.description:
1. You have unlimited chances to use sugar to rent partner for a duration
2. Owned partner can't be rent or buy again.
3. You can buy partners that you haven't owned yet. Accumulatively rent a partner for required time to own it permanently.

1500001.name: Karakura Town Festival
1500001.description:
1. You can claim achievement rewards when you meet the activation condition of current chapter.
2. Achievement rewards can be claimed once per chapter and chapters will update.
3. You can buy Zanpakutō or rent partner to finish task if you haven't met the activation condition yet.

1510001.name: Anniversary 1
1510001.description:
1. Sign-in daily during the event to claim rewards once.
2. Sign-in reaches required days to open chest.
3. Top-up card increases your topped up amount in event but won't give you Gold.

1520001.name: Anniversary 2
1520001.description:
1. Daily top-up required Gold to claim Single Top-up reward once.
2. Accumulative top-up reaches required Gold to claim Accumulative Top-up reward once.
3. Accumulative top-up reaches required Gold to get extra super rewards.

1530001.name: Anniversary 3
1530001.description:
1. When you spend Gold to draw, you can obtain same Points as the Gold you spend.
2. Every 20 players joining will activate 1 drawing, and the winner will obtain a grand prize.
3. Every player can only join each round once. 
4. Reward Record and Winners list refresh once every 5 minutes.

1540001.name: National Day 1
1540001.description:
1. Daily sign-in or late sign-in to claim corresponding giftpacks.
2. Sign-in a certain days to claim giftpacks. (Claim once only) 
3. Items in Special Offer can be purchased twice and the purchase chances will be reset daily.

1550001.name: National Day 2
1550001.description:
1. Single top-up a certain amount of Gold to claim giftpacks. (Claim for unlimited times) 
2. Accumulatively top-up a certain amount of Gold to claim giftpacks. (Claim once only) 
3. Top-up required Gold in event to claim a partner for ultimate reward.

1560001.name: National Day 3
1560001.description:
1. Spend Gold to obtain points, 1 Gold = 1 point. Points will be cleared when event ends.
2. Accumulatively spend 1000 Gold daily to get a chance to spin roulette to win reward. 
3. Players can spin 10 times at most per day and roulette resets daily.
